message:
feat(wezterm): Cx-first list_panes_with_cx trait extension + sharded propagation (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the Cx-first migration down to the WeztermInterface trait
boundary, closing the ambient-Cx gap that previously existed in
ShardedWeztermClient::collect_panes and spawn_with_hints. Continues
the ft-xbnl0.2.3 pattern already landed across NotificationPipeline,
EventWaiter, NativeEventListener, SnapshotEngine, PaneWaiter,
WorkflowRunner, SearchBridge, CautClient, SurvivalModel, MuxWatchdog,
RestoreProcess, TelemetryCollector, Tailer, IPC primitives,
RecordingManager, memory_pressure, memory_budget, cpu_pressure,
orphan_reaper, protocol_recovery, pool acquire, metrics, cass search,
wezterm list_panes / get_pane / send_text / get_pane_direction /
pane_tiered_scrollback_summary / get_text / wait_for /
wait_for_codex_session_summary, broadcast/oneshot senders, and the
Mutex/RwLock primitives.

1. wezterm.rs — WeztermInterface::list_panes_with_cx

   Adds a new default-implemented trait method gated on
   `asupersync-runtime`. Default delegates to `list_panes()` (ambient
   Cx) so non-migrated implementors compile and run unchanged.
   Implementors with a Cx-aware path (e.g. `WeztermClient::
   list_panes_with_cx` routing through `MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx`)
   SHOULD override this method to propagate caller Cx all the way
   through to the cancellable operation. The `'a` lifetime on both
   `&'a self` and `&'a Cx` allows overriders to thread the caller's
   Cx into async state held by the returned future.

2. sharding.rs — ShardedWeztermClient::collect_panes_with_cx

   Relaxes the cfg gate from
   `all(feature = "vendored", unix, feature = "asupersync-runtime")`
   to `feature = "asupersync-runtime"` alone, matching the trait-
   level default above. Calls `backend.handle.list_panes_with_cx(cx)`
   on each shard so a caller-cancelled enumeration stops between
   shards rather than completing the full sweep. Preserves the
   existing global-pane-id encoding, `shard_id` / `local_pane_id`
   extras, and PaneRoute bookkeeping. Also updates the neighboring
   spawn_with_hints_with_cx doc block to reflect the trait-level
   refactor seam now closed.

All changes strictly additive; no legacy entry points removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
